title: scutellaria teniana
intro: Scutellaria teniana, also known as Baishaoyan or Chinese skullcap, is a type of plant that belongs to the Lamiaceae family and is native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria teniana include reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to reduce stress and anxiety. Scutellaria teniana can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
